title: antennaria howellii var. athabascensis
intro: Antennaria howellii var. athabascensis, also known as Athabasca Yarrow, is a rare and unique variety of the Antennaria howellii plant, a type of flowering plant in the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone compounds. The health benefits of Athabasca Yarrow include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as its potential in treating infections and wounds. Herbal preparations of Athabasca Yarrow typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in tinctures and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under proper guidance.
